title: Maddox's 3D Gear
description: Vanilla-ish stylized 3D tools featuring inventory sprites
body:
![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7626a776087156c6e78c3184413c57540bb3a6c.png)
# About
This pack revamps the tool catalog to be more stylized and less repetitive.

Each tool tier has it's own style, for example; Wooden tools are small primitive works that appear carved, Iron equipment is the standard, Diamond looks refined, and Netherite gear is the largest, consisting of a zweihander and double sided axe.

Currrently the pack only covers swords and axes; however, there _will_ be more to come.
## Info
- Optifine or any CIT mods are **not** required for this to work
- You do not need to unzip the pack file for it to appear in-game
- The shovels are incompatible with Hold my Items! I will try to add compatibility when the pack is finished

## Credit
- SonicFan19 - spritework
- lowercasebtw & ioblackshaw - helped me out with json files
- p1kl's 3D Items & MB-3D for inspiring me

### Notes
- Pickaxes or Spears are the new priority
- The real life tools I based some of the models off of are; the gladius, tomahawk, cutlass, bearded axe, zweihander, and the double sided axe.
